name: capcut-cli
description: Edit CapCut/JianYing draft_content.json directly. JSON in, JSON out.

global_flags.name: dry_run
global_flags.description: Preview a mutating command without writing.

global_flags.name: force_write
global_flags.description: Override editor-running and changed-on-disk safety checks.

commands.name: info
commands.summary: Project overview + material summary.

output.description: JSON by default; use -H where supported for human output.

exit_codes.1: invalid input, warning, or operation failure

commands.name: version
commands.summary: Detect CapCut/JianYing version, schema flags, and support status.

output.description: JSON by default; use -H where supported for human output.

exit_codes.1: invalid input, warning, or operation failure

commands.name: lint
commands.summary: Schema-aware checks (overlaps, line length, missing files); exit 0/1/2 for CI.

output.description: JSON by default; use -H where supported for human output.

exit_codes.1: invalid input, warning, or operation failure
